case_title: PONOMARENKO FRED et al VS TAGS AUTO GLASS SPECIALISTS et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAKIMIAN TONY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY PONOMARENKO FRED OLIVIERI MARY AS TO DEFENDANT TAGS AUTO GLASS SPECIALISTS HAKIMIAN TONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PONOMARENKO FRED OLIVIERI MARY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TAGS AUTO GLASS SPECIALISTS HAKIMIAN TONY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
